title: potential pilots and their mothers souls
display_title: potential pilots and their mothers souls
wikitext:
[]: potential pilots and their mother's souls.             Quote Post by lilim » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:47 pm maybe this is a stupid question, and either way i'm sure it's been asked somewhere before, but something that bothered me when i watched Eva was if every Eva has to have the soul of it's pilot's mother in the core (excluding unit 00), how did they get the souls of the classmates mothers, that were waiting around and could have been picked if needed, like Toji? were they already in Evas? did they have souls waiting around to be put into Evas if they needed to use the children? o.O did they all happen to have mothers who worked for Nerv like Kyoko and Yui who agreed to do contact experiments? that seems unlikely. is anything like this ever addressed?

[]: Re: potential pilots and their mother's souls.             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 07, 2010 3:16 pm All their mothers are implicitly dead (true for at least Touji, Hikari and Kensuke), and Nerv could presumably grab the soul out of a dead body as easily as out of a living one.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Dec 07, 2010 4:32 pm ...

[]: Re: potential pilots and their mother's souls.             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Dec 07, 2010 4:40 pm Azathoth wrote: All their mothers are implicitly dead (true for at least Touji, Hikari and Kensuke), and Nerv could presumably grab the soul out of a dead body as easily as out of a living one.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Dec 07, 2010 6:23 pm Perhaps they expecially picked kids for candidates whose mothers they had 'disposed off'? A suspicios number of their fathers seem to work for NERV. Either that or any kid with no Mom can pilot EVA, but the results are EXPECIALLY good if the own mother is in it. This would explain why Rei who has no mother can pilot about any EVA (Unit 00, Unit 01 when Yui isn't pissed at the moment and she proposed getting into Unit 02 in eps 9 and 10 like she could get in there at any gives moment, Reis synch Ratio with Unit 01 is the same as with Unit 00 ), why Mari SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 07, 2010 7:12 pm Kendrix wrote: 2. Asuka --> Has part of her mother's soul inside her EVA

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Thu Dec 09, 2010 2:53 pm i've never thought the crazy part was added after she killed herself. do they ever allude to that, and i just missed it? and do the mothers really have to do contact experiments? Rei 1's soul was taken out of her body when she was killed and placed in unit 00's core, right? it wasn't through a contact experiment. also, who else has a father who works at Nerv? ._. Gendo, Yui and Kyoko were the only ones i knew that definitely had jobs there and whose children went on to pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 09, 2010 3:03 pm lilim wrote: i've never thought the crazy part was added after she killed herself. do they ever allude to that, and i just missed it?

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Thu Dec 09, 2010 10:18 pm hmm, i really need to rewatch the series and EoE. i don't remember either of those things, but it's really interesting. thanks!

[]: Fourth Children Candidates             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Fri Sep 09, 2011 3:30 pm Sorry if this has been asked before. So, we know that all of Shinji's class mates are potential pilots. In episode 17 Ritsuko mentions that they picked Touji, because "his core is readily available" or something to that extent. That would lead me to believe that they have a core/soul for each potential pilot, which would make sense. Does this mean NERV has a warehouse with palettes full of dead moms? How'd they get them all anyways?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 09, 2011 3:39 pm Merged with existing thread. Does this mean NERV has a warehouse with palettes full of dead moms?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 09, 2011 4:42 pm Ornette wrote: Merged with existing thread. That's the next logical inference. Maybe they have containers for their souls, or maybe they just keep the bodies frozen.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Sep 09, 2011 11:00 pm NemZ wrote: Maybe that's what they keep on the otherwise pointless destroyer floating in Lilith's drainage pool? Can't have random techs taking a wrong turn and ending up in the warehouse morgue.
summary: []: potential pilots and their mother's souls.             Quote Post by lilim » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:47 pm maybe this is a stupid question, and either way i'm sure it's been asked somewhere before, but something that bothered me when i watched Eva was if every Eva has to have the soul of it's pilot's mother in the core (excluding unit 00), how did they get the souls of the classmates mothers, that were waiting around
